nasb.text: Do I lack madmen, that you have brought this one to act the madman in my presence? Shall this one come into my house?”

esv.text: Do I lack madmen, that you have brought this fellow to behave as a madman in my presence? Shall this fellow come into my house?”

cnv.text: 難道我缺少瘋子嗎？你們竟把這人帶來我面前發瘋。這人怎可以進我的家呢？”

ccb.text: 我这里缺少疯子吗？你们怎么可以把这个家伙带到我家里，在我面前疯疯癫癫呢？”
